title: DERDUFT Christmas Reed Diffuser Gift Set - Fire Free Holiday Home Fragrance with Sweet Home & Christmas Wreath Scents 2x100ml Bottles with Reed Sticks - Festive Aroma for Living Room Bedroom Office
features: Double Scented Delight - Includes two 100ml reed diffusers – one with a cozy vanilla biscuit & musk scent called Sweet Home the other with a woody citrus & spice blend named Christmas Wreath perfect for festive ambiance

Elegant No-Flame Diffusion - This fire free diffuser set uses reed sticks to gradually release fragrance into your space offering a safer alternative to candles while filling rooms with lasting holiday aroma

Perfect Festive Gift - A thoughtful Christmas gift set for loved ones ideal for creating warm seasonal vibes in bedrooms living rooms or offices beautifully packaged to impress during the holiday season
Long-Lasting Natural Aroma - Each scented diffuser lasts weeks thanks to premium oils and efficient diffusion via reed sticks making it a must have for holiday decoration and year round cozy scenting
Stylish & Versatile Decor - The red and green glass bottles blend beautifully into your festive setup while serving as elegant home décor adding visual charm and a comforting Christmas home scent
description: Directions Insert reed sticks into the bottle, allowing the fragrance to gradually diffuse into the room. Safety Warning No specific safety warnings are mentioned, suggesting the product complies with standard safety guidelines for aroma diffusers.
